3. Students will be able to situate ﬁlms produced in various parts of the

world in relation to larger historical and cultural developments.

4. Students will understand the various uses of the moving image in its relation to the political, economic, and social history of the world over the past century.

5. Students will be able to conduct research in Cinema and Media

Studies and to write persuasively.
